name: diancie
flavor_text: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: rock-throw
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: harden
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: diamond-storm
moves.effect: Has a 50% chance to raise the user’s Defense by two stages for each target hit.

moves.name: sharpen
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: guard-split
moves.effect: Averages Defense and Special Defense with the target.

moves.name: flail
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: ancient-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.

moves.name: rock-polish
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: moonblast
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: ally-switch
moves.effect: User switches places with the friendly Pokémon opposite it.

moves.name: amnesia
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: bulldoze
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: charm
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: dazzling-gleam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: draining-kiss
moves.effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: earth-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: explosion
moves.effect: User faints.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fake-tears
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: flash
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: flash-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: gravity
moves.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.

moves.name: guard-swap
moves.effect: User swaps Defense and Special Defense changes with the target.

moves.name: gyro-ball
moves.effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: hail
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a hailstorm for five turns.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: iron-defense
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: meteor-beam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: metronome
moves.effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.

moves.name: misty-explosion
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: mystical-fire
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: nature-power
moves.effect: Uses a move which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: play-rough
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: power-gem
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: psychic
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: psyshock
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: rock-slide
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: safeguard
moves.effect: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.

moves.name: sand-tomb
moves.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: sandstorm
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

moves.name: scorching-sands
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: skill-swap
moves.effect: User and target swap abilities.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: smack-down
moves.effect: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: spikes
moves.effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: stealth-rock
moves.effect: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.

moves.name: stone-edge
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: stored-power
moves.effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: trick-room
moves.effect: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.

moves.name: wonder-room
moves.effect: All Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped for 5 turns.

moves.name: after-you
moves.effect: Makes the target act next this turn.

moves.name: covet
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: heal-bell
moves.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.

moves.name: last-resort
moves.effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: telekinesis
moves.effect: Moves have 100% accuracy against the target for three turns.

moves.name: terrain-pulse
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

abilitiesDetailed.name: clear-body
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
